what_went_well: Comprehensive proposal already existed with all 5 files: proposal.md, design.md, tasks.md, and 2 spec deltas (models-tab, model-health-recheck)
Implementation is substantially complete — all Phase 1-3 tasks verified against source code
All 37 unit tests pass across model-inventory, model-routing, and model-probe test suites
Spec deltas cover 2 capabilities with clear Given/When/Then scenarios
Design decisions are well-reasoned: single config source, backwards-compatible blacklist metadata, exact-model probe, shallow error classification
TUI Models tab is fully implemented with tab navigation, status icons, inline error details, recheck command, and alert badge
Runner model resolution already uses .opencode/oh-my-opencode.jsonc as single source of truth — no DEFAULT_FALLBACKS found
Summary generation correctly prepends model alerts via appendModelAlert() + prependModelAlertsToSummary()
improvement_suggestions: Specs were missing scenarios for: tab alert badge, empty inventory graceful state, recheck progress feedback, and recheck result message — added during this review
Tasks.md lacked implementation references (file paths) — added during this review to help downstream agents locate code
Task 4.1 (operator documentation) is the only remaining uncompleted task — docs should cover the Models tab, recheck workflow, and degraded fallback behavior
Consider adding a component-level render test for ModelsTab using ink-testing-library to cover the TUI rendering scenarios in the spec
